text: I sense that I am at a place of learning, perhaps a museum or a science center. The first scene with lines of children and a few adults feels energetic, a bit chaotic, yet purposeful. The anticipation in the air vibrates with the promise of discovery. Entering the second scene, I see a display about research and development. The environment shifts towards contemplation. Surrounded by the products of human inquiry and imagination, I feel a quiet curiosity. Here, the world’s complexity becomes evident, inviting me to reflect on our relationship with innovation. I am both a participant and an observer, woven into the ongoing dialogue between humanity and knowledge.
